product_overview: A lightweight, mobile-first personal portfolio site for Richard Pillaca showcasing projects, essays, career journey, skills, and an interactive resume. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind, the site focuses on clear case studies, filterable timelines, and easy contact/subscribe flows.
core_goals: Showcase four in-depth project case studies with methodology, metrics, findings and links to code.
Provide a browsable projects gallery with category filtering and fast navigation to project detail pages.
Present essays, an about section, a filterable career timeline, and a categorized skills grid that are easy to discover.
Enable visitors to download the resume PDF and contact or subscribe (Substack) with resilient server interactions and clear error handling.
Maintain accessible, responsive design with static generation for fast load times and strong SEO metadata.

features.name: Home (Hero, Metrics, Featured Projects)
features.description: Hero section with name/title/bio, prominent metric strip, and 3 featured project cards surfaced on the homepage.
user_flows: GET /api/metrics -> Receive 200 with metrics JSON (records_count, repos_count, etc.) -> GET /api/featured-projects -> Receive 200 with 3 project summaries -> GET /api/recent-experience -> Receive 200 with latest experience items
GET /api/metrics -> Receive 500 internal server error -> GET /api/metrics?source=cache -> Receive 200 with cached metrics -> GET /api/featured-projects -> Receive 200 with featured projects

features.name: Projects Gallery (/projects) with Category Filter
features.description: Visual cards for all four projects, with category filter buttons (All, DATA SCIENCE, RESEARCH, EXCEL AUTOMATION, FULL STACK) to refine the list.
user_flows: GET /api/projects?category=All -> Receive 200 with full projects list (includes slugs: bike-share-optimization, ai-technical-debt-research, accounting-automation, exam-analysis-system) -> GET /api/projects?category=DATA%20SCIENCE -> Receive 200 with filtered projects for DATA SCIENCE
GET /api/projects?category=UNKNOWN -> Receive 400 invalid category -> GET /api/projects?category=All -> Receive 200 with full projects list as fallback

features.name: Project Detail (/projects/[slug])
features.description: Individual project case study page showing title, category, duration, read time, overview, problem statement, phased methodology, key metrics and findings, tech stack and GitHub link.
user_flows: GET /api/projects/bike-share-optimization -> Receive 200 with full project detail JSON (overview, methodology[], metrics[], tech[], github_url) -> GET /api/projects/bike-share-optimization/metrics -> Receive 200 with extended metrics time series
GET /api/projects/nonexistent-slug -> Receive 404 not found -> GET /api/projects?category=All -> Receive 200 with projects list to redirect user back to gallery

features.name: Essays (/essays) and Essay Detail
features.description: List view of essays with title, date, read time and tags plus a Substack subscribe CTA; individual essay pages serve MDX content or HTML.
user_flows: GET /api/essays -> Receive 200 with essays list (title, slug, date, read_time, excerpt) -> GET /api/essays/example-essay -> Receive 200 with MDX content for the essay
GET /api/essays -> Receive 429 too many requests -> GET /api/essays?cache=stale -> Receive 200 with cached essays list

features.name: About & Social Links
features.description: About page with communities, beyond-work interests, and a summary of skills; footer contains social links and contact info.
user_flows: GET /api/about -> Receive 200 with about content (communities[], beyond_work[], skills_summary) -> GET /api/social -> Receive 200 with socialLinks[] and contactInfo
GET /api/about -> Receive 500 internal server error -> GET /api/about?source=static -> Receive 200 with prebuilt static about content

features.name: Journey (Career Timeline) with Type Filter
features.description: A filterable career timeline (All, Work, Research, Volunteer) showing role, organization, period and description per timeline card.
user_flows: GET /api/journey?type=All -> Receive 200 with full timeline entries array -> GET /api/journey?type=Work -> Receive 200 with filtered Work entries
GET /api/journey?type=InvalidType -> Receive 400 invalid filter -> GET /api/journey?type=All -> Receive 200 with full timeline entries

features.name: Skills Grid
features.description: Skills grid organized into categories (Data & Analytics, Software Engineering, Modeling & Research) with tech badges and proficiency metadata.
user_flows: GET /api/skills -> Receive 200 with categorized skills (categories: Data & Analytics, Software Engineering, Modeling & Research) -> GET /api/skills?category=Data%20%26%20Analytics -> Receive 200 with items for that category
GET /api/skills -> Receive 500 internal server error -> GET /api/skills?source=static -> Receive 200 with static skills payload

features.name: Resume Download (/resume)
features.description: Interactive resume page with a downloadable PDF button that triggers a server-served PDF for direct download.
user_flows: GET /api/resume/pdf -> Receive 200 with Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="Richard_Pillaca_Resume.pdf" and PDF binary -> Browser downloads PDF
GET /api/resume/pdf -> Receive 404 not found -> GET /api/resume -> Receive 200 with HTML fallback including an alternate download link and contact instructions

features.name: Contact & Subscribe (Footer / Substack CTA)
features.description: Contact form for direct messages and a subscribe endpoint that forwards subscriptions to Substack or stores them; includes validation and error handling.
user_flows: POST /api/subscribe with body { email: "user@example.com" } -> Receive 201 subscribed with subscription_id -> POST /api/contact with body { name, email, message } -> Receive 200 message received
POST /api/subscribe with body { email: "bad-email" } -> Receive 400 invalid email -> POST /api/subscribe with body { email: "user@example.com" } -> Receive 201 subscribed

pages.description: Home page with hero, featured projects, metrics, experience
Projects gallery with category filter (DATA SCIENCE, RESEARCH, EXCEL AUTOMATION, FULL STACK)
Individual project case study with methodology, metrics, findings
About page with communities, beyond work, skills
Career timeline with type filter (Work, Research, Volunteer)

layout.name: Nav
layout.features: Fixed header, scroll detection, mobile menu, route highlighting

layout.name: Footer
layout.features: Links grid, social links, contact info

ui.name: ProjectCard
ui.features: Category tag, title, metrics, tech badges, hover animation

ui.name: EssayCard
ui.features: Title, excerpt, date, read time, tags

ui.name: SectionHeader
ui.features: Reusable heading with eyebrow and subtext

ui.name: CursorBubble
ui.features: Custom cursor tracking, grows on hover

features: 4 project case studies with full methodology and metrics
Category filtering on projects and journey pages
Fixed navbar with scroll blur backdrop
Polaroid card design with mesh gradients
interactive_elements: Navigation links (Work, About, Journey, Skills, Resume)
Journey type filter tabs (All, Work, Research, Volunteer)
